authentication.deployment_requirement: Enable and provision authentication before external exposure.

operations.name: create_analysis_task
operations.purpose: Create an analysis task and return task_id.

operations.name: submit_input_metadata
operations.purpose: Register metadata or count-matrix input by safe relative path.

operations.name: validate_input
operations.purpose: Validate input structure without starting analysis.

operations.name: run_analysis
operations.purpose: Run the explicitly selected workflow after preparation.

operations.name: retrieve_artifacts
operations.purpose: List task-scoped artifact metadata before secure download.

operations.name: retrieve_summary
operations.purpose: Retrieve a concise safe result summary without generating conclusions.

requirements: Use only artifact names returned for the same task.
Treat 400 and 404 responses as non-downloadable artifacts.

error_contract.transport: HTTP status plus sanitized JSON detail

limitations: No Coze plugin is published by this contract.
No public deployment or frontend is included.
The summary layer does not create scientific conclusions.
Relative API paths require an externally configured trusted base URL.
